sections.sectionTitle: Nasemte in Amau a Langpangte Vil Kawm

verses.text: Sanballat in kote' kulh cian'na thu a zak ciangin lungkim loin heh mahmah a, ko Jew mite hong zahko hi

Amah in a kikholhpihte leh Samaria galkapte' kiangah, “Hih Jew mi niangnuangte in bang hih dinga kipan ahi uh hiam? Hih mun a bawlpha dinga kingaihsun ahi uh hiam? Biakpiakna hangin a nasep uh ni khat sungin zo dingin kilamen ahi uh hiam? Amaute in a kangtumsa ninbulomtang panin suangtum bawlkik thei ding ahi uh hiam?” ci hi
Ama kiangah a om Ammon mi Tobiah in, “Amaute in bangbang ciang ta leh amau' kulh cian' tungah ngia khat kah leh kicim lel ding hi,” ci hi

Tua ciangin keimah Nehemiah in thu ka ngen a, “Hong za in, kote' Pasian aw; kote hong kisimmawh hi. Kote hong zahkona amau' lu tungah lehtuksak in la, gamdang khatah sal suakin mi' bawlsiatin amaute omsak in
Amaute in a langtangin kulh ciangte' mai-ah nang hong hehsak uh ahih manin amau' mawhna maisak kei in la, na ciamtehna panin zong a mawhna uh sumit kei in,” ka ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin kulh ka ciang uh a, nasep a kimciang bang kizo hi. Mite in utna lungsim tawh sem uh hi
Ahi zongin Sanballat, Tobiah, Arab mite, Ammon mite, leh Ashdod mite in Jerusalem kulh cian' nasep kizom suakin, kulh vang teng huk ding a kipat khitna thu a zak uh ciangin heh mahmah uh hi
Tua hi a, Jerusalem hong simin buaina a piangsak dingin amaute kipawlin vaihawmna khat nei uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin ka Pasian uh tungah thu ka ngen uh a, amaute a en dingin sun leh zanin galvil ka koih uh hi
Tua ciangin Judah gam mite in, “Nasemte a tha uh zaw ta a, ahi zong nin tampi omlai hi. Eima tha tawh kulh cian' i zo ngei kei ding hi,” hong ci uh hi
Tua ciangin ka galte un, “Amau' phawkloh kalun amaute lakah pai-in i that ding a, a nasep uh i beisak ding hi,” hong ci uh hi
Amaute lakah a teng Jew mite khuapi sungah hong pai ciangin, ka galte uh a omna khempeuh ciat panun hong pai-in kote hong simna ding thu, sawmvei tak hong hilhkhol uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin kulh nunglam mun niam penna mun awng tengah a namsau uh, a teipi uh, leh a thal uh tawh, a innkuan kuanun ka mite ka pangsak hi

Mite' launa ka muh ciangin, uliante, mi ukte, leh mi khempeuh tungah, “Amaute kihta kei un. Na sanggamte, na tapate, na tanute, na zite uh, leh na inn na lote uh-a' dingin hong dosak, a lian a kihtakhuai Topa phawk un,” ka ci hi
Amau' hong sawmna thu kote in ka phawkna uh leh Pasian in amau' geelna a suksiatna thu ka galte un thei uh hi. Tua ahih ciangin ka nasepna ciat uh kulh tungah ka vekpi-un ka kuankik uh hi
Tua huna kipanin ka khutnuai-a om mite kimkhat in na sem a, a kimkhat in a teipite, a lumte, leh a thalte uh tawi-in sik puan silhin ding uh a, uliante in kulh a ciang Judah mi khempeuh uk uh hi
Kulh-a cian' ding na a nawn mite in a khut langkhat uh tawh a van puak uh lenin a khut langkhat uhah galhiam tawi uh hi
Kulh ciangte in na a sep kawmun a kawng ciat uhah a namsau uh kuah uh hi. Peengkul tumpa ahih leh keima kiangah om hi
Tua ciangin mi liante, mi ukte, leh mi khempeuh tungah, “I nasepna lian a, zaipi tak huam hi; eite kulh tungah kikhenin khatlekhat i kigamla hi
Peengkul kitum na zakna peuhpeuh panun ko kiangah hong kikhawm un. I Pasian in eite-a' dingin hong dosak ding hi,” ka ci hi
Tua hi a, nisimin khuavak-a kipan nitak aksi suah dong, mi kimkhat in teipi tawi-in, mi kimkhat in na ka sem uh hi
Tua hun mahin mite kiangah, “Zanin galvil, sunin nasemin hong om theihna dingun mi khempeuh na nasemte ciat uh tawh Jerusalem khuasungah hong giak un,” ka ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin keimah-a kipan ka behte, ka nasemte, leh kei hong cingte, a kuamah peuh puan suah man omloin, mi khempeuh in ka khut uhah galhiam ka tawi den uh hi.
